corrections.correct: Α ἤρξατο ὁ φόβος Ἰούδα καὶ τῶν
corrections.note: The first body line is completely wrong; the page begins mid-sentence with 'ἤρξατο ὁ φόβος Ἰούδα καὶ τῶν' after the initial capital Α.

corrections.current: ἀδελφῶν αὐτοῦ, καὶ ἡ πτῶσις ἐπίπτεν ἐπὶ τὰ ἔθνη τὰ κύκλῳ αὐτῶν.
corrections.correct: ἀδελφῶν αὐτοῦ, καὶ ἡ πτῶσις ἐπίπτεν ἐπὶ τὰ ἔθνη τὰ κύκλῳ αὐτῶν.

uncertain.note: The final word is cut at page end; transcript 'ἀπὸ τὸῦ-' appears to have a wrong accent on τοῦ, but end-of-line and scan make this low-value to correct mechanically.

notes: Body transcription has a major wrong opening line replacing the actual text of v.25. Apparatus also contains at least one clear siglum/reading error: line 24 reads γην] την V, not γην] την V? However the provided apparatus is otherwise largely accurate; I am not listing uncertain minor accent/iota-subscript differences.
